channel.title: Synchronization on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Synchronization on Systology

item.title: Agent Orchestration
item.description: Principles for architecting autonomous multi-agent systems; focusing on stateful orchestration, unified memory across agents, hand-off protocols, and human-in-the-loop governance for long-running workflows.

item.title: Real-Time Collaborative WebApp
item.description: A real-time synchronization design for collaborative applications (e.g., Google Docs, Figma); utilizing WebSockets and Operational Transformation (OT) or CRDTs for consistent state resolution.
